chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Appl. No.900 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For orders on office objections 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of MA 13984/2024. 4. For order on reference made by trial court. 27.11.2024 Mr. Ashfaque Ahmed, advocate for applicant. Mr. Masroor Ahmed, advocate for respondent No.2. Ms. Seema Zaidi, Addl. P.G. = Learned counsel for applicant at the very outset submits that this Cr. Misc. Application may be converted into application for protective bail and applicant may be granted protective bail to approach the trial court and apply for pre arrest bail. This proposal has not been opposed by other side. Accordingly, this Cr. Misc. Application is converted into application for protective bail. Office is directed to assign it proper number. Without touching merits, applicant is granted protective bail for 04 days from today subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- and PR bond in the same amount to approach the trial court and seek relief in accordance with law. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of 04 days from today or surrender of the applicant before the trial court whichever is earlier. The Cr. Bail Application is disposed of. J U D G E A.K
